data_description.name: The friendly name exposed to Home Assistant / Alexa / Google Home
data_description.ur_host: The IP address of your Windows PC running Unified Remote Server
data_description.scroll_scale: Scales scroll wheel deltas before sending to Unified Remote. Higher = faster scroll.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Unified Remote Server. Check the IP, port, and that the server is running.

abort.already_configured: This Unified Remote server is already configured.
